{{CargoRelic
|name=Piero's Canned Goods
|class_id=20727
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Piero, who used to dream of becoming a chef when he was young, was harshly commented by his father that his dishes were a mess. Now he has made the Gurgle Puff Fruit into canned goods in order to prove himself to his father...
|fame=12
|art=18
|fth=30
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 1,000 Mysterious Gloops claimed, Earth DMG +4<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 10000/10000
|ss2=Per 1,000 Mysterious Gloops claimed, Earth DMG +8<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 10000/10000
|ss3=Per 1,000 Mysterious Gloops claimed, Earth DMG +12<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 10000/10000
|ss4=Per 1,000 Mysterious Gloops claimed, Earth DMG +12<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 10000/10000
|ss7=Per 1,000 Mysterious Gloops claimed, Earth DMG +12<br>Mysterious Gloop Claimed: 10000/10000<br> (Awakened)
}}
